items.title: Supreme God Emperor
items.tagline: Official AnimeXin donghua lane with milestone scraping coverage.
items.overview: TetoNova seeds AnimeXin with Supreme God Emperor because the site exposes a deep milestone ladder. The live adapter is prepared around episode 1, 200, 252, 300, 400, 450, 500, and the latest checked multiple-of-50 releases near episode 550 from the current 593 run.
items.sourceNote: Fallback shelf for the official AnimeXin lane. Live parsing will replace this entry when the source is reachable.

items.title: Supreme God Emperor Episode 1
items.tagline: Milestone seed for legacy server mapping on AnimeXin.
items.overview: Episode 1 is seeded to represent the oldest playback pattern we checked for AnimeXin compatibility.

items.title: Supreme God Emperor Episode 200
items.tagline: Milestone seed for mid-run player variation checks.
items.overview: Episode 200 is included so the AnimeXin lane can benchmark mid-run server rotation against older and newer milestones.

items.title: Supreme God Emperor Episode 252
items.tagline: Milestone seed for mixed server generations on AnimeXin.
items.overview: Episode 252 sits in the transition zone between older and newer player stacks, making it useful for fallback verification.

items.title: Supreme God Emperor Episode 300
items.tagline: Milestone seed for newer mirrored player stacks on AnimeXin.
items.overview: Episode 300 gives TetoNova a newer checkpoint for direct media, mirrored embeds, and auto-fallback behavior on AnimeXin.

items.title: Supreme God Emperor Episode 400
items.tagline: Milestone seed for stable dual-hardsub and all-sub player checks.
items.overview: Episode 400 confirms the newer AnimeXin stack where Dailymotion, Ok.ru, Mega, Rumble, and Dood remain present across hard-sub and all-sub lanes.

items.title: Supreme God Emperor Episode 450
items.tagline: Milestone seed for post-400 mirror consistency checks.
items.overview: Episode 450 keeps the same multi-server stack as episode 400, making it useful for verifying that AnimeXin does not rotate hosts wildly between nearby milestones.

items.title: Supreme God Emperor Episode 500
items.tagline: Milestone seed for late-run server consistency checks.
items.overview: Episode 500 still exposes the same Dailymotion, Ok.ru, Mega, Rumble, and Dood family, so TetoNova can treat the 400-500 range as one stable playback generation on AnimeXin.

sections.title: AnimeXin Pilot
sections.subtitle: Official TetoNova fallback shelf for the AnimeXin donghua lane.

sections.title: Supreme God Emperor Milestones
sections.subtitle: Milestone episode seeds used to harden player extraction on AnimeXin.
